'''Besum''' was a four-eyed individual who was employed by [[Uso Yso]]. During the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]], [[Bog Divinian]], a member of the [[Games Council|Galactic Games Council]] in charge of seating the Senators, told [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] that Besum gave him the seating chart for the [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] so he transferred the credits and ordered the seating from Besum.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}}
